name: Ralph's Retch
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jell-O according to package directions.
2. Pour the mixture into a shallow pan and chill until firm, about 3 hours.
3. Using a dull knife, make as many cuts as possible across the length and width, forming tiny cubes.
4. With an adult's help, grind the ice cubes in a blender.
5. Spoon alternating layers of crushed ice and Jell-O pieces into tall glasses, filling them about 2 inches away from the tops.
6. Slowly pour soda into each glass until full.
7. Stir gently.
8. Serve with ice tea spoons so your guests can get at every chilly glob.
Sicko Serving Suggestion: Almost any cooked food can look like puke if you grind it for a few seconds in a blender. And it makes for a tasty sandwich spread!
